headline: Gary O'Neil set for Ipswich Town manager role
body: Ipswich Town is set to appoint Gary O'Neil as their new head coach, with personal terms and an agreement with Strasbourg now in place.
text:
Personal terms now in place between Gary O'Neil and Ipswich.🚜


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Ipswich Town set to appoint Gary O'Neil as their new head coach following the departure of Kieran McKenna.

An agreement is in place with Strasbourg. Talks at an advanced stage on personal terms.🚜

🤝 @alex_crook





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2068058650523079021#m
